name: taurodeoxycholate to H2O
summary: A 9-step route from taurodeoxycholate to H2O, ingested from Rhea. Every step is curated by Rhea and independently verified here to balance in mass and charge.

reactions.name: cholate--CoA ligase
reactions.equation: deoxycholate + ATP + CoA = deoxycholoyl-CoA + AMP + diphosphate

reactions.name: a fatty acyl-CoA + taurine = an N-fatty acyl-taurine + CoA + H(+)
reactions.equation: a fatty acyl-CoA + taurine = an N-fatty acyl-taurine + CoA + H(+)

reactions.name: an N-(fatty acyl)-glycine + H2O = a fatty acid + glycine
reactions.equation: an N-(fatty acyl)-glycine + H2O = a fatty acid + glycine

reactions.name: leukotriene C4 + H2O = leukotriene F4 + glycine
reactions.equation: leukotriene C4 + H2O = leukotriene F4 + glycine
